subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab and others, spoken on 1914-11-29
subcodes.first_line: Those who are endued with spiritual insight see in the small chapter a typical portrayal of the present upheaval in all parts of the world
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @chastisement and requital, @justice and mercy, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @war and peace, @apocalyptic imagery
